title: DrafterOutput
description: Output of the Drafter Agent — a fully drafted formal complaint letter and associated metadata.

letter_text.description: Full formal complaint letter in legal-register Spanish, ready to print or send. Newlines as \n.

addressee.description: Full institution name or authority the letter is addressed to (e.g. 'Superintendencia Nacional de Salud — SUSALUD').

subject.description: Subject line of the letter (Asunto), concise and descriptive.

legal_articles_cited.description: List of legal article references cited in the letter body.

patient_request.description: Specific request made by the patient in the complaint (Petitorio section summary).

estimated_response_days.description: Number of business days within which the authority must legally respond.

disclaimer.description: Fixed disclaimer: 'Defensor no reemplaza a un abogado. Esta es información legal, no asesoría legal.'

warnings.description: List of warnings about missing or weak data that may reduce the complaint's effectiveness.
